children.name: Product defects

AssertionError: Expected status code 204, but got 404. Response: {'fault': {'faultstring': 'Unable to identify proxy for host: internal-qa.api.service.nhs.uk:443 and url: /immunisation-fhir-api/FHIR/R4/Immunization/b5b37c6e-b7d0-407f-aca7-56c98e115efd', 'detail': {'errorcode': 'messaging.adaptors.http.flow.ApplicationNotFound'}}}
assert 404 == 204
 +  where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
 +    where <Response [404]> = <utilities.context.ScenarioContext object at 0x7f061b8e0b90>.response
Verify that the POST Create API for different vaccine types
